refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid fault recovery, which are key contributors to availability. This refinement clarifies measurable sub-functions.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period; verify fault detection and recovery times meet target thresholds.
sub_frs: Ensure rapid detection and recovery from faults

candidate_dps: Redundant system components and failover mechanisms
Automated recovery procedures and restart protocols
selected_dp.selected_dp: Implement redundant components with failover and real-time fault monitoring combined with automated recovery procedures

potential_sources: Interaction between fault monitoring and recovery procedures
Coordination between redundant components and failover logic
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP integrates fault monitoring and recovery tightly but maintains modular separation to minimize coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable telemetry data for fault detection
Risk of increased complexity leading to integration errors
Assumes failover mechanisms do not introduce new failure modes
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor integration complexity and validate failover logic thoroughly during implementation.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level availability management including redundancy, fault monitoring, and recovery coordination

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time system status and fault data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends commands to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules to initiate failover or recovery actions

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Issues alerts to Safety Services in case of critical availability-impacting faults

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and other modules for coordination and data exchange

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of availability logic; low diffusion as functionality is centralized.
Vehicle provides telemetry but does not contain availability logic.
Teleoperation interfaces with availability but logic is not contained here.
Receives alerts but does not implement availability functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing availability management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Risk of delayed fault response if communication interfaces are slow
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modular sub-division within NGHE Solution if complexity grows; optimize interface latency.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by the selected DP which addresses minimizing downtime and rapid recovery.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support the assignment of availability logic to NGHE Solution module.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and operational logs collected through known interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability functions to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity of NGHE Solution module to avoid bottlenecks
Validate interface performance to ensure timely fault response

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, with clear containment and manageable risks. Verification approaches are feasible.
next_level_sub_frs: Ensure rapid detection and recovery from faults

revise.why: Current level decomposition and assignments are adequate; no immediate revision needed.

open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Operational availability data from system tests
